name: Hyperliquid MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Hyperliquid — a high-performance decentralized perpetuals exchange on its own L1 blockchain. Enables AI agents to query market data, check positions, retrieve order books, and potentially execute trades on Hyperliquid — supporting AI-driven DeFi trading research and automation.
use_cases: Querying Hyperliquid market data and order books from research agents
Monitoring DeFi trading positions and P&L from portfolio agents
Analyzing perpetuals market conditions from quantitative research agents
Integrating Hyperliquid data into AI-driven trading strategy workflows
not_for: Fully autonomous trading without human oversight — high financial risk
Retail users without understanding of perpetuals and liquidation risks
best_when: A DeFi trader or quant researcher wants AI agents to access Hyperliquid market data, analyze perpetuals markets, and assist with trading research in a supervised environment.
avoid_when: CRITICAL: Never allow agents to execute live trades autonomously — DeFi transactions are irreversible and perpetuals carry liquidation risk. Query/read access only for agent use; human approval required for all orders.

auth.notes: Hyperliquid API key or wallet private key for trading operations. Read-only endpoints may not require auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Hyperliquid API is free; trading fees apply to orders
pricing.notes: Hyperliquid API access is free. MCP server is free open source. Trading incurs on-chain transaction fees.

performance.rate_limits: Hyperliquid API rate limits; L1 blockchain throughput

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Perpetuals trading involves leverage and liquidation risk — irreversible financial losses possible
NEVER allow agents to execute trades autonomously — all orders must have human approval
Wallet private keys grant full trading access — treat as most sensitive credential, never expose to agents
DeFi is 24/7 — agents operating overnight can incur significant losses without oversight
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRITICAL: Wallet private keys for trading are extremely sensitive. Never expose to agents. Only read-only API access for agent queries. Perpetuals trading with AI has extreme financial risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRITICAL: Wallet private keys are highest-value secret. Never expose to autonomous agents. Read-only mode only for agent integration.
